title: ‘Sleeping Dog’ Doc, About UFO Researcher Jeremy Corbell, Lands May Release (Exclusive)
description: Falcon Scout Media distributes director Michael Lazovsky's feature about a leading voice behind the push for UAP disclosure.

title: 'UFO' over Kaitorete Spit? It’s a secret weapon in a war on hedgehogs
description: While Wellington secures millions for its own mission, Canterbury’s night-shift “soldiers” are already using thermal drones to win the final battle on the ground.

title: Inside Ashley Cole's Serie B gig: Italian sceptics say it's akin to a 'UFO landing', but here's why sources insist he'll succeed, the unusual way he honed his coaching skills, why players bond with him and the simple passing trick he taught Levi Colwill
description: Ashley Cole has had to be patient. While many others from England's 'golden generation' quickly found themselves in top jobs, Cole has continued his extensive coaching education. Until now.
